description: Evals for testing the YOLO FastAPI data-layer skill.

cases.prompt: Refactor the YOLO API data layer from raw sqlite3 to SQLAlchemy ORM.
cases.expected_output: The agent creates a SQLAlchemy-based data layer, removes raw sqlite3 usage, keeps the existing API behavior unchanged, and all tests pass.
assertions: SQLAlchemy is used instead of sqlite3
No raw SQL strings are used

cases.prompt: Create a separate models.py file for the YOLO SQLAlchemy models.
cases.expected_output: The agent creates services/yolo/models.py and moves or defines SQLAlchemy ORM models there while keeping database setup in db.py.
assertions: db.py keeps engine, SessionLocal, and get_db

cases.prompt: Update all database-backed endpoints to use FastAPI dependency injection.
cases.expected_output: Every endpoint that reads or writes the database receives a SQLAlchemy Session using db: Session = Depends(get_db).
assertions: No endpoint opens a raw database connection manually
SQLAlchemy Session is used for reads
SQLAlchemy Session is used for writes

cases.prompt: Make the data layer support SQLite locally and PostgreSQL in production through environment variables.
cases.expected_output: The database URL is configurable using DATABASE_URL, defaults to SQLite, and can switch to PostgreSQL without code changes.
assertions: DATABASE_URL is read from environment variables
SQLite is the default local database
requirements.txt includes SQLAlchemy and PostgreSQL driver

cases.prompt: Update API tests to use a temporary SQLite database and mocked YOLO model.
cases.expected_output: Tests use temporary SQLite databases, override get_db, mock the YOLO model, and assert both status codes and response body structures.
assertions: Tests do not touch the real database
Tests assert status codes and response body structure
